colour_text: Three nights after being buried in his tomb, the former Duke of Aquitaine emerged as a dreaded Vampire. He immediately began slaughtering those he used to protect, and his once holy Paladin armour became permanently stained crimson and enchanted from the blood.

item_set.name: Campaigner
item_set.description: In life, the Red Duke led a successful invasion of Araby. He can now apply his skill to his Undead horde.

effects.description: Replenishes 10% campaign movement range after winning a battle

colour_text: This armoured helmet was found while plundering an ancient tomb-city in the Chaos Wastes. It was created at the dawn of civilization, but protects better than any modern equivalent.

item_set.name: Attuned for Battle
item_set.description: Harald's true skills as a warrior are only revealed after extensive fighting, becoming more deadly as the battle rages on.

ui_effects.localised_text: Effect intensity increases with each kill made by the unit. (Maximum intensity at 200 kills)

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

colour_text: Due to his incredible bulk, Grom is able to wear heavy chainmail that is decorated with skulls, spikes and bones to created a terrifying figure. Unfortunately for Grom, the protective armour is becoming a bit difficult to squeeze into these days...

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.

item_set.name: Bane of Elves
item_set.description: Countless battles and endless skirmishes againts Elves have made Grom an expert at killing the pointy-ears.

effects.description:
Missile resistance: 10% when fighting against Elves
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: This gilded steel helmet is decorated with smooth larimar gems and radiates light that resembles the golden rays of a morning sun. The light from this helm fills comrades with a comforting warmth and inspires them to stand and fight against the enemies of Kislev.

Settra was one of the greatest Human rulers this world has ever known, founding the Empire of Nehekhara. His armour is enchanted with powerful magic, socketed with valuable jewels, and fancifully gilded. It is almost worthy to be worn by the King of Kings.

item_set.name: Time of Reclamation
item_set.description: Items of great power have been collected. Now is the moment for Settra to gather all of his armies and begin a great conquest.

colour_text: Tlaloc was a mighty Saurus, who claimed to have defeated more Daemons than any other Lizardman. After mysteriously disappearing, his armour was buried deep in the vaults of the Temple of Skulls. Some Skinks claim Tlaloc will return for the final war against Chaos.

effects.description: Ward save: 10% when fighting against Norsca, Warriors of Chaos, Chaos Dwarfs and Daemons of Chaos

item_set.name: Ancient Tactician
item_set.description: Surviving thousands of years, fighting countless wars and aquiring items of power have honed Kroq Gar's tactical abilites, allowing him to instantly change plans for battle.

colour_text: High Queen Khalida Neferher, the Warrior Queen of Lybaras, was truly adored by her subjects. She reestablished worship of the goddess Asaph as Lybaras's main deity and had her crown fashioned in the shape of two Asps.

item_set.name: Summon the Sentinels
item_set.description: Sepulchral Stalkers are essential for securing borders, especially during times of war.

colour_text: Sparing no expense, the massive suit of armour was commissioned by Emmanuelle XV von Liebwitz, and created by the combined efforts of Nuln Engineers with Dwarf armourers. The underside of the thick steel plates are inscribed with Dwarf Runes of defense, making the man wearing this formidable armour as tough as a bastion.

related_attributes.bullet_text: When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any large attacker.
When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any attacker.
When bracing, this unit causes additional damage when attacking charging enemies.

colour_text: A thick leather belt with a golden emblem of Grimnir serving as the buckle. It was found in a secret chamber while exploring Karak Eight Peaks.

item_set.name: Luck or Fate?
item_set.description: Gotrek just won't die! Is it luck or fate that prevents him from meeting his doom?

colour_text: Retrieved from a slain Grail Knight in 2007 IC during an invasion of Chaos raiders, this modest plate mail has been blessed by the Lady.

item_set.name: Revered Leader
item_set.description: Donning several relics of Bretonnia creates a passion for service.

colour_text: The brass overlaid on this large wooden shield has magical properties. When the shield bearer is threatened, the metal of the ikem shines with a blinding white light and directs beams of light towards foes.

target_if: Unit is a Lord or Hero

item_set.name: Gold Fever
item_set.description: "There's gold behind those walls. I will have it."

contains.name: Ring of the Mighty River Horse

colour_text: Tattoos using the blood of Dragons as ink cover Scyla's muscled body. The tattoos depict torturous scenes of cruelty and images of graphic violence, while the magical properties of the Dragons' blood enhances Scyla's strength.

item_set.name: Epitome of Violence
item_set.description: Scyla has become a living weapon. Killing is the only thing he can do.

colour_text: Forged from Meteoric Iron, these bracers have developed a taste for carnage and will guide and strengthen the attacks of whoever is wearing them. You would expect the Bracers to be permanently stained by blood, but they seem to absorb any gore that splashes onto them.

item_set.name: Exiled, but Exalted
item_set.description: Even though he was banished, Daemons are still eager to join Skarbrand. Khorne cares not from where the blood flows, only that it flows.

effects.description:
Recruitment duration: -1 turn for Exalted Bloodletters of Khorne, Bloodcrushers of Khorne and Bloodthirster units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: These golden bracers are inscribed with symbols from the Old Ones' language. The symbols are constantly changing, as if updating the information to current events. The bracers not only provide powerful protection, but whoever wears them reacts as if the wearer knows what is about to happen.

item_set.name: Death from Above
item_set.description: Tiktaq'to can use his mystical artefacts to clear cloudy skies and see great distances; allowing him to spot ambushes.

colour_text: Kholek is a gigantic and ancient creature of evil, who is energised by the great power of lightning. He wears great plates of brass that are encrusted with the patina of age and blackened by soot, in order to attract the blasts of a raging storm.

item_set.name: Bigger and Better
item_set.description: Dragon Ogres are naturally drawn to the most powerful beings, and now Kholek is undeniably the strongest of his kind.

effects.description: Local Warband recruitment: +5 capacity for Dragon Ogre units

colour_text: It is believed by many that the giant Arachnarok Spiders were originally created by some type of foul magic, because the Winds seem drawn into items created from the beasts' carapace. This small breastplate was created from the remains of one of the giant spiders.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +15

item_set.name: Forest Lurker
item_set.description: The dark forests of the Old World are natural habitats for the Forest Goblins and their spiders. They excel at fighting in such an environment.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

Reload time reduction: +10% during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Southern Bretonnia was ravaged when an army of Forest Spirits rampaged across the lands surrounding Parravon. Many valuable relics and artefacts were taken from La Chald Abbey and are now used to further Drycha's dangerous schemes.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

item_set.name: Feral Friends
item_set.description: The vicious creatures of the forest are eager to fight in Drycha's war against nature.

effects.description:
Upkeep and cost: -60% for Cave Bats, Feral Manticore, Giant Spiders, Great Hawks, Giant Wolves and Feral Bear units
	(all armies)

colour_text: Before the shattering of his mind, Luthor was a talented magician. He cast warding spells on his clothing for additional protection, which remain active even though his sorcerous abilities are currently limited.

item_set.name: Reptile Reaper
item_set.description: One does not rule the Vampire Coast without extensive experience battling Lizardmen.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +10% when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: A brass helmet created in the Blood Forges of Khorne's realm. It has been designed to fit the horned head of Skarr and can radiate an intense heat that severely burns any who try to strike the wearer.

target_if: Grounded

item_set.name: Bringer of Death
item_set.description: Death is the only outcome for Skarr or his opponents.

colour_text: Muddied pieces of Norscan plate armour and hardened leather provide some protection without interfering with the speed or maneuverabilty of the wearer. Perfect for hunting and scouting.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.
This unit can pass through trees.

item_set.name: Hunter Killer
item_set.description: No target is safe from Mournhowl. He is now equipped to relentlessly hunt far and wide; until he has slain his prey.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

effects.description: This character becomes able to see enemies hiding in forest regardless of distance

colour_text: A set of black plate armour that originates from the hellish forgeworks of the Chaos Dwarfs and provides a level of personal protection matched only by Gromril armour. Such is its strength, that only weapons of arcane origins stand a chance of penetrating this grisly plate.

item_set.name: Savage Northmen
item_set.description: Wulfrik led daring raids all over the World and collected many different treasures. His men will fight like Daemons in order to gain further glory.

effects.description:
Ward save: 10% for Marauder units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: The chitinous exoskeleton of a Giant Spider can be used as a surprisingly effective shield. It excels at protecting from enemy missiles.

item_set.name: Forest Frenzy
item_set.description: Snagla is infamous for using forests' terrain and resources to gain deadly advantages.

effects.description:
Ward save: 5% during forest battles
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: This corroded suit of armour is enchanted to release fumes that quickly decays nearby metal. Although this set of Chaos Armour is covered in rust and appears brittle, it still protects better than most mundane armour.

item_set.name: Rot Beast Herd
item_set.description: Owning such an array of foul, putrid, smelly and corrossive artefacts seems to attract vile Rot Beasts to whatever location Kayzk finds himself.

effects.description:
Upkeep: -10% for Rot Knight units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: The armour of the slain Ogre Tyrant, Karaka Breakmountain, is still being worn by his dominated body. Images of skulls have begun to form on the gutplate, due to Chaos corruption, but the amour remains sturdy and imposing.

item_set.name: Corrupted Ogres
item_set.description: The poor ignorant Ogres of Tamurkhan's hordes are too stupid to realise they have become unwilling hosts to the many blessings of Nurgle.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Regeneration" for Plague Ogres units (Rank 7 and above)
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Made from the skin of Elves and dyed black, this dark leather corset greatly enhances the wearer's speed and offers the protection provided by leather armour. It is doubtful that the unfortunate Elves who make up this tunic were dead at the time of flaying.

item_set.name: Favored of Slaanesh
item_set.description: Stronger Daemons are drawn to N'kari in an attempt to be noticed by the Dark Prince.

effects.description:
Hero recruit rank: +3 for Alluresses
	(all provinces)

colour_text: Throgg's cape was originally meant to serve as barding for a mighty warhorse. It has become permanently stained with blood, due to being worn in so many battles, and reeks of the coppery smell of ichor.

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

item_set.name: Will Not Die
item_set.description: Trolls are infamous for their regenerative abilities making them almost impossible to kill. What happens when a Troll has a collection of magic items?

colour_text: This artefact was stolen from the treasury of Ungrim Ironfist. It was once an enchanted Dwarfen shield, but now serves as an Ogre Gutplate. The shield redirects oncoming missiles, firing them back at the shooter. To the simple-minded Ogres, it looks like the Gutplate spits the missiles at its enemies.

effects.description: Passive ability: "Bullet Spitta." Projectiles fired by the unit are reflected back at it!

target_if: Missile unit

ui_effects.localised_text: Redirects projectiles back towards the firing unit

phases.onscreen_name: Projectiles fired by the unit are reflected back at it!

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can block projectiles regardless of its facing.

item_set.name: Literal Maneaters
item_set.description: Envious of Golgfag's collection of treasures and with hopes to join the legendary mercenary, Ogres near and far make an extra effort to eat more humanoids.

contains.name: War Crown of the Forgotten Conqueror

effects.description:
Bonus vs Infantry: +5 for Ogre Infantry units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Created by a daemon-smith of the Blood Forges. Hundreds of mortals were slain during blood rituals to enchant this armour and make it stronger than steel.

item_set.name: The Wrath of Hell
item_set.description: The burning rage of Khorne has spread through his Champion's army, leaving mountains of charred skulls in their wake.

colour_text: Heavy metal plates with dangerous barbed spikes welded onto them are strapped to Taurox's body. The crude armour is quite effective, due to its thickness, and the spikes gorge foes who are foolish enough to engage in melee.

item_set.name: Apex Minotaur
item_set.description: Such is Taurox's strength, that even ferocious Minotaurs will follow and obey.

effects.description:
Unit capacity: +2
	Minotaurs
	Minotaurs (Shields)
	Minotaurs (Great Weapons)

colour_text: This well crafted armour previously belonged to the former Grand Chieftain of the Deep Warrens. Tretch claimed the armour when he claimed the title, and he has proven to be exceptionally difficult to kill.

item_set.name: Finders Keepers
item_set.description: It is amazing what treasures can be found on the dead, and Tretch makes sure he takes the time to safely look for it.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +25%

colour_text: This once luxurious robe was taken from the corpse of a very wealthy Empire nobleman and is now stained by dirt, blood and other unsavoury fluids. Malagor eventually performed a blasphemous ritual with other Bray-Shamans to enchant the clothing with the power of Chaos.

item_set.name: Master of Dhar
item_set.description: Dhar, also known as Black Magic, draws on all eight of the Winds. With such an array of artefacts, the dark sorceries are more powerful than thought possible.

colour_text: A tattered robe plagued by a plethora of pox. Plants wither and die and the air seems to congeal and darken. Each new infection toughens Skrolk and leaves a new permanent stain to this shroud.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -30% for "Pestilent Breath"

item_set.name: Sickening Physique
item_set.description: Skrolk draws strength from disease and is so inured to pain that he doesn't feel it.

colour_text: During his younger (and slightly thinner) years, Greasus had to perform incredible feats of strength to prove to the other Tyrants he was worthy to become the Overtyrant. One feat was slaying a Dragon by jumping on its neck. Greasus later had the Dragon hide made into protective pants.

item_set.name: Mighty Overtyrant
item_set.description: Powerful martial abilites and a love of gold have made Greasus the greatest Overtyrant.

colour_text: Finely crafted rune armour of black steel forged from the hardest meteoric iron. It protects against any mortal weapon and is often worn by Druchii nobility, even when they are off the battlefield.

This set of armour was forged by the unparalleled talents of Dwarf smiths. It incorporates some of the actual armour worn by Magnus the Pious during the Battle of Kislev. The armour is made of black Gromril and is richly gilded and adorned with runes and symbols of power.

item_set.name: Diplomat of Order
item_set.description: The Empire is surrounded by enemies who are hell-bent on destroying the mighty nation. But, the Empire also has many old and loyal allies.

colour_text: This mirroring suit of armour was created in the dimension of pure magic, known as the Empyrean. The reinforced steel plating has taken an azure colour and uses intricate etchings and gildings to create imagery reflecting the insanity of the Realm of Chaos.

item_set.name: Sorcerer Lord of Change
item_set.description: The most powerful sorcerers of Tzeentch are able to make slight adjustments to reality. An army is seen in the distance, and suddenly it is right in front of you!

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

colour_text: Worn since the begining of Felix's many adventures, this sturdy chain shirt has become affected by the same magic that rejuvenates Felix. The armour has become enchanted and offers considerable protection, despite its ordinary appearance.

item_set.name: Hero in the Ranks
item_set.description: Having such a famous hero, especially one armed with powerful artefacts, fighting in the ranks does wonders for the army's morale.

colour_text: These pieces of fur clothing were created by an unknown wizard, who wanted to be comfortable while being protected. The outfit provides the protection of steel armour, while keeping the wearer nice and cool despite being in the most humid jungle.

item_set.name: Imperial Huntsmarshal
item_set.description: With a collection of artefacts and expertise for monster hunting, the Huntsmarshal is given a final gift; a supply of enchanted ammunition that can pierce the thickest hides and scales.

colour_text: Bones as sharp as spikes emerge from the backs and shoulders of all Flesh Hounds. However, Karanak is larger than any other Hound and has exceptionally long, razor-sharp boney spines.

item_set.name: Fetch!
item_set.description: It seems even the most vicious and violent Hound enjoys bringing items to its master.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +50%

colour_text: A heavy breastplate created to fit the hunched posture of the Fimir. It is made of galvanized steel, and the dull exterior plating allows the wearer to easily hide in the mist that always coincides with the Fimir.

item_set.name: We Need Slaves
item_set.description: When the Fimir raiding parties go to war, capturing slaves is the priority. Pillaging and killing are just bonuses.

effects.description: Unit ability: "Slaver Nets" for Ketzak Fimdirach and Fimir Warriors units

colour_text: The greatest and most honoured warriors of the Empire go to battle wearing sturdy suits of plate armour that was created by Dwarfs. It is the best armour available in the Empire and is worn by great generals and some Elector Counts.

item_set.name: Protecter of the Drakwald
item_set.description: Drakwald Forest is infested with all manner of foul creatures. Raiders from the North, monsters and worshipers of the Ruinous Powers are about to be destroyed by a prepared Graf Boris.

effects.description:
Leadership: +10 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Gilded armour created for a King. It was worn long ago during the wars against nomad tribes. Although the armour is thousands of years old, it still provides excellent protection.

item_set.name: Nomadic Tactics
item_set.description: To defeat the nomad, you must fight like the nomad.

colour_text: Midas was one of the most famous Magister Alchemists, who dedicated his life trying to discover a means of True Transmutation. He created these powerful gloves to help protect College Wizards from dangerous experiments.

Each year Orion is reborn into thunderous life on the first day of spring. He emerges from the Oak of Ages and will don these enchanted leather gloves. The gloves generate an exhilarating desire to hunt, whether it be beast or man.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Even when performing the most fatiguing actions, this unit never loses vigour.

colour_text: The remaining pieces of golden armour worn by a forgotten Daemon Prince. The Daemon claimed to be a golden god, ruling and reigning supreme from its kingdom in the mountaintops. But, it was quickly destroyed during the Daemon Prince Wars.

item_set.name: First Damned
item_set.description: Long ago, Be'lakor was blessed by all four of the Chaos gods. With his collection of artefacts, he can begin aquiring a new source of power.

colour_text: Protected by metal plating, this tall headress is a large clockwork mechanism with golden gears and torsion springs. Somehow, it serves as a direct conduit to a higher plane of existence. Slann are the only creatures capable of wearing such a device, for only their mind can handle the complexity of the universe.

item_set.name: Newfound Power
item_set.description: Mazdamundi is now more powerful than ever, thanks to his impressive armoury. He is now able to emit a magic barrier to help protect his entire army.

colour_text: The Kingdom of Avelorn is the oldest of all the Elven realms. It's believed this elegant dress was created by Isha and given to Astarielle, the first recorded Everqueen. The gown has incredible magical qualities and excels with healing.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -35% for "Earth Blood"
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +20

item_set.name: Protector of the Natural Order
item_set.description: One of Isha's domains is nature, and the goddess protects her forest allies with her blessing.

effects.description:
Ward save: +10% for Forest Spirit units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: The only thing that ever made Isabella vaguely desirable was her stunning, but cold, beauty. She wears a scarlet gown over her suit of armour, but not as a display of vanity. The dress is magical, distracting and mesmerizing all who look upon it.

item_set.name: Vampire Noble
item_set.description: As a daughter of an Elector Count, Isabella learned to make sure taxes were always collected.

colour_text: The only thing that ever made Isabella vaguely desirable was her stunning, but cold, beauty. She wears a scarlet gown over her suit of armour, but not as a display of vanity. The dress is magical, distracting and mesmerizing all who look upon it.

item_set.name: Vampire Noble
item_set.description: As a daughter of an Elector Count, Isabella learned to make sure taxes were always collected.

colour_text: During his adventures, Henri once saved a famous Dwarf blacksmith from a monstrous Jabberslythe. The grateful Dwarf awarded Henri with this rare set of Gromril armour and modified it to fit a large Manling.

During the year 2498 IC, Skarsnik ambushed a Dwarf army crossing the treacherous valley known as Mad Dog Pass, which later became known as the Battle of the Jaws. This glimmering chain vest was taken from one of the dead Dwarfs.

item_set.name: Endless Schemes
item_set.description: Constant planning, preparations and a little luck guarantee a bit of protection from enemy schemes.

effects.description:
Hero action success chance: +15%
	(Heroes in local region)

Enemy Hero action success chance: -15%
	(enemy characters in region)

colour_text: A sinister crown for the First of the Hag Queens. It's coloured black, made from runic metal and twisted into a cruel design to resemble daemonic horns.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

item_set.name: Consort to Daemons
item_set.description: This collection of artefacts enhance one's ability to summon and control Daemons of Chaos.

colour_text: One of the few remaining treasures from the destroyed temple-city, Tlanxla. The ancient bracelet is has a unique square shape and is decorated with red triangles, representing conflict. It was left behind by the Old Ones.

item_set.name: Divine Kroxigor
item_set.description: Empowered with a variety of ancient treasures, Nakai's mere pressence increases the spawning of his fellow Kroxigors.

effects.description:
Upkeep: -15% for Kroxigor and Sacred Kroxigor units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Bearing the holy icon of the Bull of Hashut, this tall helmet is made of Blackshard and has the blessing of the Father of Darkness.

item_set.name: Modified Firearms
item_set.description: After aquiring a bountiful collection of artefacts and treasures, Ezar can afford to equip better firearms for his soldiers. He only does this to gain more personal glory, of course.

colour_text: After emerging from the Well of Eternity, Kairos was awarded two golden crowns from Tzeentch. Since he is blind to the present, Kairos is vulnerable to attack and wears these majestic crowns when venturing into the realm of mortals.

item_set.name: Master of Magic
item_set.description: Everything about magic is known to the Fateweaver. There are none who come close to being equal.

effects.description:
Cooldown: +25% to enemy spells
	(enemy characters in region)

colour_text: Before being reborn as a Champion of Tzeentch, Helbrass had a final moment of remorse as he recalled nine events that had brought him to this fate. These feelings of despair were taken and stored in this helmet. Although Helbrass can never again feel the pangs of guilt, he can fill his foes with his lost despair.

item_set.name: Conqueror of Kislev
item_set.description: The future has been revealed to Aekold. He will conquer Kislev. It is his destiny. It is his fate.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +9 when fighting against Kislev
	(Hero's army)

Melee defence: +9 when fighting against Kislev
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: A captured Daemon traded this helmet to Sayl for its freedom. It allows one to focus their Witchsight and provides the wearer significant protection from spells.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

item_set.name: Spawn Summoner
item_set.description: Using his powerful artefact collection, Sayl has mastered summoning the unique Nightmaw Spawn.

colour_text: Tahoth is the patron of knowledge and wisdom of the Nehekharan Pantheon and appears as an Ibis. Khatep came across the helm during his exile, but some believe Tahoth gave it to him personally.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

item_set.name: Oldest and Wisest
item_set.description: Khatep was the first member of the Mortuary Cult to truly deny death's embrace. He uses his ancient knowledge to remember the secrets of past dynasties.

colour_text: A bronze helmet with metal extensions resembling soaring bat wings. Although tarnished and dulled from age, this helm still creates an inspiring aura, encouraging the ancient soldiers who still fight alongside their old king.

effects.description:
Leadership: +9 for Grave Guard and Black Knights units
	(Hero's army)

item_set.name: Return of the King
item_set.description: The Barrow King goes to war once more. Armed with his full panoply, he brings a renewed fighting spirit to his loyal soldiers.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 for Grave Guard and Black Knights units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: Tehenhauin led a massive Skink migration from Chaqua, bearing plaques which proclaimed the coming of Sotek. He now wears the golden plaques over his chest, blessing all those who fight for the Serpent god.

effects.description:
Chance of a plague spreading: -50%
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Sotek's Skinks
item_set.description: The Skinks are roused and ready for war. They are eager to sacrifice the enemies of Sotek.

effects.description:
Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Oracles
	(all provinces)

Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Chiefs
	(all provinces)

Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Priests
	(all provinces)

colour_text: A shield made from petrified lumber that is enchanted to protect from any type of decay. It was a gift from the Mortuary Cult after King Setep restored the priesthood to its ancient rank and status.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute ignore the effects of enemy contact effects such as  Poison

item_set.name: Priest King
item_set.description: King Setep's many dealings with the Mortuary Cult has provided him with a collection of powerful artefacts. He understands the importance of the Cult and always wants a Liche Priest near.

colour_text: Skulltaker wears an incomplete assortment of Chaos Armour, covering only the most vulnerable parts of his body and maximizing his effectiveness with dueling. The black steel plates are inscribed with litanies of hate found in the Liber Malefic, causing the armour to harden when struck by a foe.

ui_effects.localised_text: Effect intensity increases as the unit takes damage

item_set.name: Preparing for Vengeance
item_set.description: Sigmar Heldenhammer is the only one to have ever bested Skulltaker in combat. Since that defeat, Skulltaker has collected artefacts and perfected killing Humans in preparation for the next time he battles Sigmar.

effects.description: Melee attack: +8 when fighting against Humans
Weapon strength: +16% when fighting against Humans

colour_text: A near impervious relic of holy might. A dazzling light, originating from a blessing from the Lady of the Lake, makes it painful for dark beings to look upon their foe.

Heavy steel plates from the armour of slain Dwarfs were reforged to fit Gorbad and painted red so he is easily seen during chaotic battles. Greenskins claim the moans of the dead Dwarfs, whose armour was repurposed, emanates from the armour during combat.

effects.description: Attribute: Causes Terror when fighting against Dwarfs

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.

item_set.name: Destroyer of Solland
item_set.description: After plundering the Moot, destroying Averheim and burning Nuln, Gorbad has accumulated vast amounts of treasure. The province of Solland is next...

effects.description:
Leadership: +10 when fighting against Empire
	(Lord's army)

Attribute: Causes Terror when fighting against Empire
	(Lord's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.

colour_text: Arkhan the Black, also known as the Liche King, was the first and most loyal of Nagash's followers and an adept pupil in the study of Death Magic. He led many armies and always wore this unique and protective armour.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Spirit Leech"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Spirit Leech Upgraded"

item_set.name: Vizier of the Undying King

The Slann was known for his unique collection of golden charms and trinkets, and the jewelry were the only remaining articles of the Mage-Priest.

item_set.name: Daemon Hunter
item_set.description: It is a rare individual who can kill Daemons and survive to kill again.

The Colleges of Magic expect wizards to venture out into the world and aquire knowledge or artefacts, and rings, such as this one, help keep the mages alive.

item_set.name: Champion of Morr
item_set.description: Morr is the god of Death and guards souls from Chaos and Necromancy. Elspeth is his chosen champion, and she will destroy those who threaten the dead.

effects.description:
Enables flaming attacks when fighting against Daemons and Undead
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Blood Magic
item_set.description: Favour from Khaine is gained from the spilling of blood.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Blood Armour" for Death Hag, Witch Elves, Har Ganeth Executioners and Sisters of Slaughter units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Bull Bodyguards
item_set.description: As the High Priest of Hashut, Astragoth has the authority to demand the unquestionable loyal services of additional Bull Centaurs. The mighty creatures are always quick to obey.

effects.description: Hero capacity: +1 for Bull Centaur Taur'ruk
Unit capacity: +3 for Bull Centaur Renders units

colour_text: Near the end of his life, King Alkazzar II paid Dwarf smiths a fortune to create a suit of armour to wear when entombed. The rare metal is nearly impenetrable to all but the most powerful magic weapons.

item_set.name: Known to the Old World
item_set.description: "When my father ruled, Nehekhara was known as the greatest empire to ever exist. Every civilization feared us. Now is the time to remind the Old World of our power!"

contains.name: Death Mask of King Alkhazzar II

effects.description: Diplomatic relations: +20 with men, High Elves, Wood Elves, Lizardmen and Dwarfs

colour_text: Armour created by the Order of Vaul and made of gilded ithilmar plates. Its former wearer was Moraelir, the previous Captain of the Phoenix Guard who willingly handed this armour over to Caradryan.

item_set.name: Asuryan's Fire
item_set.description: Caradryan will use the artefacts blessed by Asuryan to burn the foes of the Asur.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Sacred Flame" for Arcane Phoenix and Flamespyre Phoenix units
	(Hero's army)

item_set.name: Anabolic Steroids
item_set.description: Clan Moulder has an incredibly large stockpile of chemicals to strengthen and toughen its forces. Side effects include baldness and death.

colour_text: An elaborate, bleached gown made from an unknown silk-like material from the Otherworld. It's almost as beautiful as the woman underneath it and is stronger than any armour, despite its lack of weight.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -35% for "Earth Blood"

item_set.name: Blessings of the Grail
item_set.description: The greatest servants of the Lady are given blessed weapons to vanquish all foes.

effects.description:
Armour-piercing weapon damage: +5 for Grail Knights, Grail Guardians, Royal Pegasus Knights, and Hippogryph Knights units
	(Lord's army)

No expense was spared supplying the Supreme Patriarch with blessed robes for hunting Witches and fighting Daemons. The blue cassock is covered by a white vestment and is adorned with golden medallions.

item_set.name: Man Without Fear
item_set.description: Faith will give you the strength to eliminate all the terrors of the world.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 when fighting against Warriors of Chaos, Daemons of Chaos, Chaos Dwarfs, Norsca and Beastmen
	(Lord's army)

item_set.description: Saytang the Watcher was created thousands of years ago by the Dragon Emperor using a more advanced Construct design. Unfortunately, this design is very difficult, time consuming and impractible, so it is no longer used.

item_set.description: The artefacts of Slaanesh will always attract the Daemonettes.

	(all armies factionwide)

effects.description:

item_set.name: Fortress Architect

Although he has the freedom to catalogue diseases as he sees fit, Epidemius is still bound to an unending task and these cuffs are a literal reminder of him being trapped by duty.

item_set.description: "Don't kill them too quickly. I want to see what happens next..."

effects.description:
Melee attack: +8 for Sartosan units
	(Lord's army)

	(all units in army)

item_set.name: Sorcerer Lord of Change

No one but Raschid knows what happened, but he was driven mad by his experiences in that cursed land. Upon returning to Araby, Raschid wrote this blasphemous masterpiece.

item_set.name: Endless Corpses
item_set.description: An effective Undead army will have a numberless amount of bodies to feed ghouls, perform evil experiments and replenish combatants.

colour_text: Made from stagnant swamp water mixed with a variety of fungi and plants, Swamp Brew is a hallucinogenic liquid that when drunk, allows the drinker to see the Winds of Chaos as clearly as an Elf. It tastes horrible though, even to Fimir.

item_set.description: When the Fimir raiding parties go to war, capturing slaves is the priority. Pillaging and killing are just bonuses.

effects.description: Unit ability: "Slaver Nets" for Ketzak Fimdirach and Fimir Warriors units

item_set.name: Fetch!
item_set.description: It seems even the most vicious and violent Hound enjoys bringing items to its master.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +50%

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

colour_text: Four porcelain jars with murals painted on their surface. The murals depict King Setep's greatest achievements. Inside the jars are the lungs, liver, stomach and intestines of the mighty king. Powerful spells make the jars unbreakable, and they can only be opened by a secret ritual.

item_set.name: Priest King
item_set.description: King Setep's many dealings with the Mortuary Cult has provided him with a collection of powerful artefacts. He understands the importance of the Cult and always wants a Liche Priest near.

colour_text: Khan-Queen Miska, known as The Slaughterer, was a formidable user of Ice Magic and laid the foundations for unifying Kislev. Her crimson cape retains some of Miska's power and always reappears when thought lost.

effects.description:
Armour-piercing missile damage: +2 for Jade Warrior Crossbowmen and Celestial Dragon Crossbowmen units
	(Lord's army)

Missile damage: +4 for Jade Warrior Crossbowmen and Celestial Dragon Crossbowmen units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: As a champion of the great chained arena in Hell Pit, Ghoritch demands a greater portion of the rewards after a battle. No Skaven is brave enough to defy giving tribute.

Clan Mors is one of the most powerful of the Warlord Clans and is ruled by the ruthless Lord Gnawdwell. The Skaven of Mors are uncharacteristically united as one, and Queek has almost unlimited access to the clan's vast armouries.

effects.description:
Recruitment cost: -15% for Stormvermin units
	(all armies factionwide)

Armour piercing damage: +5 for Stormvermin units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Unified Warriors

Passive ability: "Unified Warriors" for Clanrats and Stormvermin units
	(Lord's army)

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

item_set.name: Kinship with Bears

effects.description:
Upkeep: -10% for War Bear Riders, Elemental Bear, War Sleds and Little Grom units
	(all armies)

target_if: Grounded

item_set.name: Hellish Hedonist
item_set.description: No matter how deranged or depraved, the temptation to join in such sickening, but pleasurable, behavior is greater when artefacts of Slaanesh are nearby.

effects.description:
Unit experience gain per turn: +125
	(all units in army)

colour_text: The Kingdom of Caledor is named after the powerful Caledor Dragontamer, who first bound Dragons to his will using harnesses of enchanted truesteel smelted in the fiery heart of Vaul's Anvil. The crown is worn by the ruler of Caledor and is a relic of the kingdom's former glory.

effects.description:
Recruitment cost: -35% for Dragons and Dragon Princes units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Song of Power
item_set.description: While waking Dragons, Imrik sings songs of power to enhance the creatures' formidable strength.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +25% for Dragon units
	(Lord's army)

The golden crown is lined with a crimson velvet padding and decorated with silver and gems. The crown also has eight pieces of ivory, carved to resemble mountain peaks, rounding the circlet. It  serves a reminder of the past and inspires Dwarfs to support the oath to retake the Eight Peaks.

item_set.name: War of Attrition

colour_text: Created by an unknown Vampire who was destroyed at sea, this incorporeal knife empowers ethereal creatures and allows them to cause even more harm.

effects.description:
Armour piercing and melee attack: +5 for Syreen units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Mistress of the Deep
item_set.description: Power is one of the few known secrets found in the deepest depths of the sea.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -20% for Lore of the Deep

item_set.name: Now I am Become Death
item_set.description: Such a collection of death dealing artefacts has turned a deadly Ogre into the deadliest Ogre.

colour_text: Lignum vitae is one of the heaviest types of lumber found in the Old World. It must be imported from the High Elves of Ulthuan, but it makes war chariots far sturdier.

effects.description:
Armour: +10 for Skeleton Chariot and Skeleton Archer Chariot units
	(all armies factionwide)

Charge bonus: +20 for Skeleton Chariot and Skeleton Archer Chariot units
	(all armies factionwide)

item_set.name: Known to the Old World
item_set.description: "When my father ruled, Nehekhara was known as the greatest empire to ever exist. Every civilization feared us. Now is the time to remind the Old World of our power!"

contains.name: Death Mask of King Alkhazzar II

effects.description: Diplomatic relations: +20 with men, High Elves, Wood Elves, Lizardmen and Dwarfs

colour_text: Many Engineers usually carry a detachable telescopic scope for their weapons. This rare accessory has been specially crafted with diamond lenses to greatly enhance the sight distance.
A collection of scrolls detailing the tactics King Wakhaf used to defeat the nomadic tribes. Focusing on speed and outmaneuvering his enemies granted the king great victories.

effects.description: Enables lightning strike battles when reinforcements are present

item_set.name: Nomadic Tactics

item_set.name: Decider of Doom
item_set.description: As the War-Mourner, it is Garagrim's duty to choose which Slayer goes to his honoured death. The more experienced Slayers are chosen first.

effects.description:
Hero recruit rank: +5 for Dragon Slayers
	(all provinces)

item_set.description: Sailors (at least the living ones) know Aranessa generously rewards her crew. It is also encouraging to serve under a captian who is favoured by a god.

item_set.name: Luck or Fate?
item_set.description: Gotrek just won't die! Is it luck or fate that prevents him from meeting his doom?

effects.description:
Chance of a plague spreading: +10%
	(Hero's army)

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +20% when fighting against Humans
	(Hero's army)

effects.description:

	(Lord's army)

effects.description: Diplomatic relations: +15 for Bretonnia, Dwarfs, Kislev and Southern Realms

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +10 for Aspiring Champions units
	(all units in army)

item_set.name: Crazy Killers

	(Hero's army)

effects.description:

	(Lord's army)

	(enemy characters in region)

effects.description:
Melee attack: +8 for Grave Guard, Black Knights, and Blood Knights units

item_set.name: Master of Magic
item_set.description: Everything about magic is known to the Fateweaver. There are none who come close to being equal.

effects.description:
Cooldown: +25% to enemy spells
	(enemy characters in region)

effects.description: Hero capacity: +1 for Bull Centaur Taur'ruk
Unit capacity: +3 for Bull Centaur Renders units

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +20

item_set.description: This collection of Artefacts allow true mastery of the Lore of Ice.

effects.description: Cooldown: -10% to Lore of Ice spells

effects.description:

	(enemy Slaaneshi armies in local region)

effects.description:

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +2 per turn

item_set.name: Loremaster
item_set.description: Only the most intelligent scholars and researchers can become a Loremaster.

effects.description: Replenishes 15% campaign movement range after winning a battle

item_set.name: Apex Minotaur
item_set.description: Such is Taurox's strength, that even ferocious Minotaurs will follow and obey.

	Minotaurs

item_set.description: Donning several relics of Bretonnia creates a passion for service.

colour_text: A secretive brew made from foul ingredients allows the creation of Nurglings with claws sharp enough to slice through the strongest metals.

effects.description:

	(all armies factionwide)

	(all armies factionwide)

Recruitment cost: -7% for all Daemonic units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: The lance originally used by Gilles le Breton, during the unification of Bretonnia. Unbreakable and blessed by the Lady, it has been carried by the lords of Bretonnia past, granting the wielder enhanced strength and speed.

item_set.name: Epitome of Chivalry
item_set.description: With the mighty armaments of a King, Louen inspires his Grail Knights to perform great deeds in battle.

related_attributes.bullet_text: When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any large attacker.
When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any attacker.

item_set.name: Return of the King
item_set.description: The Barrow King goes to war once more. Armed with his full panoply, he brings a renewed fighting spirit to his loyal soldiers.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 for Grave Guard and Black Knights units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: Also known as the Teutonengeschichte, this tome contains holy texts of the Ulrican Cult. Ulric is a warrior god and gifts his followers with great strength.

item_set.name: Protecter of the Drakwald
item_set.description: Drakwald Forest is infested with all manner of foul creatures. Raiders from the North, monsters and worshipers of the Ruinous Powers are about to be destroyed by a prepared Graf Boris.

effects.description:
Leadership: +10 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Bards sing of a love between an Elvish Maid and Prince Alastar. She gave him a locket of her golden hair as a symbol of their love. Tragically, she was killed by an enchanted lion.

item_set.name: Legend of Chrace
item_set.description: Armed with his powerful equipment, Alastar is ready to lead the soldiers of Chrace to victory.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 for White Lions of Chrace, War Lions and Lion Chariot units
	(Lord's army)

Melee defence: +5 for White Lions of Chrace, War Lions and Lion Chariot units
	(Lord's army)

Winds of Magic cost: -5 for "Sakhmet's Incantation of the Skullstorm Upgraded"

colour_text: As the lord of the sea and god of storms, Mathlann is most highly revered by Black Ark Corsairs. Although Mathlann is a fickle god, some still earn his favour.

item_set.name: Mathlann's Protection
item_set.description: Such dedication to a god of the sea is sure to gain a boon.

effects.description:
Ward save: +20% when fighting at sea
	(Lord's army)

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -25% for Lore of Shadows spells

item_set.name: Trusted Companion
item_set.description: They say to keep your friends close, but when you have a friend as powerful as Ulrika, you better keep her very close.

item_set.description: After spending hundreds of years in the Black Fortess, one will learn a thing or two about the construction of fortresses and how to defend them.

Enables replenishment in foreign territory

item_set.description: Envious of Golgfag's collection of treasures and with hopes to join the legendary mercenary, Ogres near and far make an extra effort to eat more humanoids.

item_set.name: Dread Incarnate

colour_text: King Louis the Young gave Repanse this necklace as a gift before she left for her Errantry War. It protects with divine powers and was made to honour the Crusading Knights of old.

item_set.name: Revered Leader
item_set.description: Donning several relics of Bretonnia creates a passion for service.

colour_text: Always kept on Arkhan's person, this small box is made of a strong black metal and wrapped with ancient parchments of powerful wards. The contents of the phylactery are unknown, but it weakens and drains the soul of any who come too close.

effects.description: You can't kill what is already dead (Arkhan will return next turn if wounded)

item_set.name: Vizier of the Undying King
item_set.description: Nagash made Arkhan his grand vizier after he crowned himself king of Khemri, for Arkhan was most adept in the study and development of Necromancy.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -25% for Lore of Death spells

colour_text: Created by a mad shaman, this fetish is made of a black stone and carved to resemble the horned head of a roaring creature. It was given to Throgg as tribute, protecting him and enhancing his monstrous infantry.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 for Trolls, Fimir and Skin Wolves units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Will Not Die
item_set.description: Trolls are infamous for their regenerative abilities making them almost impossible to kill. What happens when a Troll has a collection of magic items?

colour_text: Inscribed with magic script from the land of Cathay, these bracers have been worn by all of the previous Clan Eshin Deathmasters. The bracers greatly enhance the wearer's combat abilities and offer thaumaturgic protection.

item_set.name: Retinue of Death
item_set.description: Having several agents available for the sinister schemes of Clan Eshin has proven to be a most beneficial tactic.

colour_text: The last Master Runelord of Vala-Azril-Ungol, more commonly known as Karak Eight Peaks, was named Degan Goldshield. He created this steel helm and inscribed it with protective Runes. Sadly, he was killed in a battle against the Skaven shortly before the Dwarfs evacuated their greatest kingdom.

effects.description: Shared cooldown: -15% for all Master Rune Magic

item_set.name: Ready for Runes
item_set.description: Preparation for working with the dangerous Runes takes many years and requires the proper tools.

colour_text: Made from the impervious scales of a Dragon that was terrorizing the Dukedom of Lyonesse. Henri battled the foul creature for two days, until he finally slayed the monster and used its scales to create a magical belt.

Shortly after landing in Lustria, Markus and his men slew a legendary Dread Saurian, the largest predator on the continent. A large scale was taken from the reptile as a trophy, but it is large enough to serve as a shield.

item_set.name: Imperial Huntsmarshal
item_set.description: With a collection of artefacts and expertise for monster hunting, the Huntsmarshal is given a final gift; a supply of enchanted ammunition that can pierce the thickest hides and scales.

colour_text: Styrkaar once had a dream where he pulled off the head of his father, Jerg Svengor, using only his bare hands. He lifted Jerg's head over his open mouth and swallowed the flowing dreams, ichor and gore from the head's gaping neck. When Styrkaar awoke, his lips were stained with blood and he was wearing this pendant.

target_if: Unit is a Lord or Hero

colour_text: Found deep in the mines of Nan-Yang, this large emerald seems to act as a conductor for Ghyran, the Lore of Life. The emerald was cut and fastened to a necklace, offering powerful protection from anything that can damage a living being.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -50% for "Earth Blood"

item_set.name: Castellan to the Great Bastion
item_set.description: Centuries of defending the Dragon's Spine has taught Miao Ying to always be prepared for a siege.

colour_text: Mother Ostankya always keeps a vast collection of bones in a wicker basket. She uses the bones to decipher and understand the Spirits' will, in order to gain boons such as healing, enhanced magic or protection from harm.

ui_effects.localised_text: Grants one of the listed effects at random

item_set.name: Natural Remedies
item_set.description: Although Mother Ostankya is extremely dangerous, she also has vast knowledge of healing roots, herbs and fungi to aid those she views as allies.

colour_text: At the heart of Galleon's Graveyard lies the Maelstrom, a sentient whirlpool that pulls shipwrecks and the dead of the sea into its watery depths. Part of the Maelstrom's malevolant pressence is contained in this large glass bottle and a deathly pull is felt by all those too close to the curio.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Melkoth's Mystifying Miasma"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Melkoth's Mystifying Miasma Upgraded"

item_set.name: Sea Monsters
item_set.description: Monstrous creatures from the depths of the ocean are drawn to items attuned by the sea.

colour_text: Large black crystals were found in Slaanesh's realm and fitted into a lustrous golden necklace. The flawless crystals were cut perfectly, with a skill that could only be inspired by the Dark Prince himself. All daemons seem drawn to these crystals, even daemons of Khorne.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -4 for "Acquiescence Upgraded"

effects.description:

It is well known Malekith hates the cold, but not even he can deny the usefulness of this pendant.

item_set.description: Constant planning, preparations and a little luck guarantee a bit of protection from enemy schemes.

One requires exceptional focus to resist the urges caused by this artefact.

item_set.description: With enough of Slaanesh's treasures collected, thralls gather and hedonistic desires make manifest.

colour_text: The Blasted Lands is a realm of fire, smoke and shadow. A Chaos Dwarf, named Khorakk, ruled the great iron fortress Dronangkul. Wulfrik led a bloody assault at this bastion and kept this protective amulet as a reward.

item_set.name: Savage Northmen
item_set.description: Wulfrik led daring raids all over the World and collected many different treasures. His men will fight like Daemons in order to gain further glory.

effects.description:
Ward save: 10% for Marauder units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.description: Saytang the Watcher was created thousands of years ago by the Dragon Emperor using a more advanced Construct design. Unfortunately, this design is very difficult, time consuming and impractible, so it is no longer used.

colour_text: An amulet made from the heart of the lion known as Uabaiff. The vicious beast was warped and mutated by Chaos magic and believed to be unkillable, until Prince Alastar proved the rumours false.

item_set.name: Legend of Chrace
item_set.description: Armed with his powerful equipment, Alastar is ready to lead the soldiers of Chrace to victory.

item_set.name: Apex Minotaur
item_set.description: Such is Taurox's strength, that even ferocious Minotaurs will follow and obey.

	Minotaurs

item_set.name: Chef der Quzeen
item_set.description: Skrag now has all the tools he needed to become a master chef, encouraging Ogres to stick around for fancy eats.

item_set.name: More Machine Than Mutant
item_set.description: One look at Ghoritch will make you wonder if there is anything left alive on his giant body.

item_set.name: Grand Alchemist

Coeddil scattered his enemies and seized Morghur, thus allowing Ariel to destroy the foul Beastman. Ever since that battle, Coeddil can become a living vessel for the essence of Nature.

Some interpret the mark being the image of a carrion fly, while others hold that it represents the cycle of birth, decay, and death.

item_set.name: Curious Observer
item_set.description: "Don't kill them too quickly. I want to see what happens next..."
