colour_text: Before battle, N'kari can be seen gently caressing a silver ring that bears the Mark of Slaanesh. His touch will activate the ring, causing it to invade the thoughts of his enemies and offering them their greatest desire. IF, they only join N'kari for one simple battle...

item_set.name: Favored of Slaanesh
item_set.description: Stronger Daemons are drawn to N'kari in an attempt to be noticed by the Dark Prince.

effects.description:
Hero recruit rank: +3 for Alluresses
	(all provinces)

colour_text: An ivory ring carved from the horn of a mighty Stegadon. When Gor-Rok first emerged from the spawning pool of Itza, his size, pure albino colourings, and lone arrival immediately marked him as a future champion. He was given this mighty ring to aid him in battle.

item_set.name: Ancient Protector
item_set.description: Gor-Rok has fought countless battles to defend Lustria and his mighty relics will benefit his forces.

effects.description:
Melee defence: +5 when in own territory
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: While trapped in the Realm of Chaos, Oxyotl eventually discovered and traveled through the fabled Lost City of the Old Ones. During the exploration of the city, he found three golden rings that are imbued with ancient wards of protection.

effects.description:
Chance of a plague spreading: -20%
	(Lord's army)

Seduce Units budget: -20%
	(enemy Slaaneshi armies in local region)

item_set.name: Daemon Hunter
item_set.description: It is a rare individual who can kill Daemons and survive to kill again.

effects.description: Missile damage: +15% when fighting against Warriors of Chaos and Daemons

colour_text: Large putrid petals are collected from the Red Camellia, the rarest flower found in Nurgle's Garden, and they're impaled upon the spikes of a rusting chain. Athough the withered petals have lost their luster and are decaying, it's Nurgle's favorite flower and only gifted to his champions of the great battles fought in Zanbaijin.

effects.description:
Chance of a plague spreading: +25%
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Corrupted Ogres
item_set.description: The poor ignorant Ogres of Tamurkhan's hordes are too stupid to realise they have become unwilling hosts to the many blessings of Nurgle.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Regeneration" for Plague Ogres units (Rank 7 and above)
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: It's true; Slayers want to die a glorious death. However, no one wants to die pointlessly from a stray arrow or cowardly spell. Use of Rune Magic is often employed to protect oneself from such an uneventful demise.

item_set.name: Luck or Fate?
item_set.description: Gotrek just won't die! Is it luck or fate that prevents him from meeting his doom?

colour_text: Creating magical Runes is an incredibly dangerous occupation, so most Runesmiths will take measures to protect themselves from the hazards of their craft. Artefacts that syphon the Winds of Magic to create protective warding and empower Rune Magic are greatly treasured amongst the best Runesmiths.

effects.description:
Enemy Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: -10
	(local region)

item_set.name: Syphoner of the Winds
item_set.description: The proper collection of gear will allow a Runesmith to extract a massive amount of magic from the surrounding area, leaving less power available for enemy wizards.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic cost: +15% for all enemy spells
	(enemy armies in local region)

colour_text: The Old One known as Xokha is the Giver of Strength and is mostly venerated by the Saurus. This powerful amulet is made of the purest gold and encrusted with the finest jewels. It's shaped into Xokha's Glyph and some Slann believe Xokha personally wore the amulet long ago.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Xokha's Battle Frenzy" for Saurus Infantry and Temple Guard units
	(Lord's army)

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

item_set.name: Ancient Tactician
item_set.description: Surviving thousands of years, fighting countless wars and aquiring items of power have honed Kroq Gar's tactical abilites, allowing him to instantly change plans for battle.

colour_text: This belt made from thick linseed wraps has gold lining and a large sapphire cut to look like the carapace of a khepra beetle. Many spells of warding have enchanted this belt, but it also has the ability to summon a swarm of flesh eating insects and arachnids.

ui_effects.localised_text: Strong vs units with 25 or more entities

item_set.name: Priest King
item_set.description: King Setep's many dealings with the Mortuary Cult has provided him with a collection of powerful artefacts. He understands the importance of the Cult and always wants a Liche Priest near.

colour_text: Made in the image of a skull carapaced khepra beetle, this talisman surrounds Settra with the protective energies of Usirian, god of the underworld. It was given to him long ago by a priest of the Mortuary Cult.

ui_effects.localised_text: Activates automatically when conditions are met

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -3 for "Usirian's Incantation of Vengeance"
Winds of Magic cost: -5 for "Usirian's Incantation of Vengeance Upgraded"

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit does not suffer any form of leadership loss and will never rout.

item_set.name: Time of Reclamation
item_set.description: Items of great power have been collected. Now is the moment for Settra to gather all of his armies and begin a great conquest.

colour_text: A silver sigil appearing as the symbol for Slaanesh has imprinted itself on the Masque's breast ever since she was cursed to dance for eternity. She will never be allowed to rest. The seal will prevent her from stopping, even at the moment of imminent defeat.

ui_effects.localised_text: Activates automatically when conditions are met

item_set.name: Unholy Pageant
item_set.description: The artefacts of Slaanesh will always attract the Daemonettes.

effects.description:
Recruitment cost: -50% for Daemonettes of Slaanesh and Exalted Daemonettes of Slaanesh units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: As a child, beautiful shells and treasures of the sea would often wash ashore near Aranessa. Manaan blessed the shells to protect his adopted daughter and any who aid her.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +20%

item_set.name: Infamous Captain
item_set.description: Sailors (at least the living ones) know Aranessa generously rewards her crew. It is also encouraging to serve under a captian who is favoured by a god.

colour_text: Vampires have the ability to regenerate and heal from the most grievous of wounds, so many find it odd that Luthor wears a velvet eye patch. They do not know it allows Luthor to, "see," far more than they could ever imagine.

item_set.name: Reptile Reaper
item_set.description: One does not rule the Vampire Coast without extensive experience battling Lizardmen.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +10% when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: At the height of his power, Be'lakor wore a multi-pointed crown made from complete blackness. The crown was created from an unknown, tangible material and felt weightless. However, the circlet was broken into several pieces and lost much of its power the first time Be'lakor was banished.

item_set.name: First Damned
item_set.description: Long ago, Be'lakor was blessed by all four of the Chaos gods. With his collection of artefacts, he can begin aquiring a new source of power.

colour_text: The Changeling carries a talisman that resembles the Mark of Tzeentch. The talisman is made of gold and shaped like a slithering flame. Also, it attracts the attention of the Great Schemer.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +9 per turn

Winds of Magic cost: -10% for all spells
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Never Enough Pawns
item_set.description: The most elaborate tricks sometimes requires assistance from, "allies."

colour_text: Skink Priests are the most intelligent of their skittish kind, whose roles within their society are to act as religious figures, magic-users and important emissaries for their mighty Slann. The greatest Priests are given an enchanted golden signet ring as a sign of their authority.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +8

item_set.name: Sotek's Skinks
item_set.description: The Skinks are roused and ready for war. They are eager to sacrifice the enemies of Sotek.

effects.description:
Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Oracles
	(all provinces)

Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Chiefs
	(all provinces)

Hero recruit rank: +3 for Skink Priests
	(all provinces)

colour_text: A ghastly looking chain made of a white material resembling steel. It has intricately carved symbols that emits glowing light on every heavy link. The chain temporarily binds the souls of the recent dead and creates a protective warding.

ui_effects.localised_text: Effect intensity increases with each nearby entity death.

item_set.name: Now I am Become Death
item_set.description: Such a collection of death dealing artefacts has turned a deadly Ogre into the deadliest Ogre.

colour_text: The spider god, known as the Feaster from Beyond, is a god primarily worshipped by the Spider Kult of the Forest Goblins. This eight-legged totem bestows a blessing from the ravenous diety.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +8 for Spider and Spider Rider units
	(Lord's army)

Melee defence: +8 for Spider and Spider Rider units
	(Lord's army)

item_set.name: Forest Lurker
item_set.description: The dark forests of the Old World are natural habitats for the Forest Goblins and their spiders. They excel at fighting in such an environment.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

Reload time reduction: +10% during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: The Straghov family are related to the Duke of Praag and have defended northern Kislev for generations. Ulrika's father, Ivan Petrovich Straghov, gave her the magical jewelry when she left in search of Karag Dum.

effects.description: Diplomatic relations: +15 with all Kislev factions

item_set.name: Trusted Companion
item_set.description: They say to keep your friends close, but when you have a friend as powerful as Ulrika, you better keep her very close.

target_if: Unit is a Lord or Hero

colour_text: Sudenland was once a Grand Barony that was annexed by Wissenland in 2512 IC. This cloak is believed to be a magical heirloom once belonging to the old rulers of Sudenland, the Toppenheimer dynasty. Always a revolutionary at heart, Felix wears this fashionable cloak in memory of, "Old Solland."

item_set.name: Hero in the Ranks
item_set.description: Having such a famous hero, especially one armed with powerful artefacts, fighting in the ranks does wonders for the army's morale.

colour_text: This talisman is a marvel of goldsmithery and was created at the Anvil of Vaul. It's covered in sumptuous gemstones and filigree work with a large enchanted saphire in the center. The artefact once belonged to Caledor Dragontamer, creator of the Vortex and one of the greatest Arch Mages of his age.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +5 per turn
Winds of Magic cost: -20% for overcast spells
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +25

colour_text: Believed to have been personally crafted by Khorne and made entirely of brass, this talisman was created to resemble a human skull with eight points extending from the center. The artefact provides eight blessings that become more powerful as the wearer kills more enemies.

ui_effects.localised_text: Effect intensity increases with each kill made by the unit. (Maximum intensity at 888 kills)

item_set.name: The Wrath of Hell
item_set.description: The burning rage of Khorne has spread through his Champion's army, leaving mountains of charred skulls in their wake.

colour_text: A golden ring decorated with green gems. When moved, it briefly retains a transparent visual notification, commonly described as a, "ghost ring." This bizarre ring exists in the 4th dimension, creating a anchor point for all timelines.

target_if: Not on or below a platform

ui_effects.localised_text: Summons an alternative timeline version of Vilitch

item_set.name: Sorcerer Lord of Change
item_set.description: The most powerful sorcerers of Tzeentch are able to make slight adjustments to reality. An army is seen in the distance, and suddenly it is right in front of you!

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

colour_text: Shortly after Azhag united the northern Orc tribes, hordes of Night Goblins from Red Eye Mountain joined his army. The Goblins gave Azhag this stone necklace, which was stolen from the Dwarfs.

item_set.name: Un-Orcish Tactics
item_set.description: Using advanced military maneuvers no Orc should be capable of executing has an very unnerving effect on enemy forces.

colour_text: This silver talisman has the shape of a wolf's head and is an ancient heirloom of the Todbringer family. Ulric is the imperial god of war, winter and wolves, and he protects those who battle in his name.

item_set.name: Protecter of the Drakwald
item_set.description: Drakwald Forest is infested with all manner of foul creatures. Raiders from the North, monsters and worshipers of the Ruinous Powers are about to be destroyed by a prepared Graf Boris.

effects.description:
Leadership: +10 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons and Norsca
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Kings of a bygone time were often entombed in great barrows with treasures and grave warded artefacts to protect the remains of the dead. This bronze amulet has a fell lodestone clapper from one of the bells found on a Corpse Cart attached, creating an item that protects and heals the Undead.

target_if: Undead

item_set.name: Return of the King
item_set.description: The Barrow King goes to war once more. Armed with his full panoply, he brings a renewed fighting spirit to his loyal soldiers.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 for Grave Guard and Black Knights units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: Vaul is armourer to the hosts of heaven and patron to blacksmiths and artisans. This powerful ring was crafted by the Order of Vaul and is made completely of black adamant. The Eltharin rune of Vaul is carved upon the ring's band.

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

item_set.name: Song of Power
item_set.description: While waking Dragons, Imrik sings songs of power to enhance the creatures' formidable strength.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +25% for Dragon units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: A small cloudy crystal that provides mystical protection and is capable of summoning long dead spirits. If you hold the crystal close to your ear, you can hear voices screaming in pain and terror. No one knows how Heinrich aquired this powerful artefact, but some believe it was a gift from the Chaos gods.

item_set.name: One Foot in the Grave
item_set.description: Heinrich has dabbled in the Dark Arts for so long, his Witchsight has developed far beyond what was thought possible for mortals.

colour_text: Ikit constructed an intricate helmet to cover his mutilated and hairless skull. The helm offers impressive protection to the cranium and due to Ikit's ingenious design, is able to provide a magical barrier.

effects.description: +20% chance to acquire Warp-fuel after battle

related_attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

item_set.name: Warpstone Energy
item_set.description: The collection of machinery syncs with the Warpstone powering it and is able to project a protective barrier.

colour_text: Warpstone is considered by scholars as the ultimate physical manifestation of pure magic. Skaven have been known to incorporate Warpstone into armour or jewelry to add a magical property to their otherwise normal gear.

item_set.name: Finders Keepers
item_set.description: It is amazing what treasures can be found on the dead, and Tretch makes sure he takes the time to safely look for it.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +25%

colour_text: Long ago, Throt's left eye was torn from its socket by a rival Packmaster. A shard of Warpstone was jammed into the empty socket, and it now feeds power into Throt's body and mind.

item_set.name: Anabolic Steroids
item_set.description: Clan Moulder has an incredibly large stockpile of chemicals to strengthen and toughen its forces. Side effects include baldness and death.

colour_text: The Waystones of Athel Loren contain the wild lands within, but the great trees are always straining to escape the magic barrier. This talisman captures the spirit of the forest, invigorating Durthu and allowing him to unleash the stored power.

item_set.name: Bitter Awakening
item_set.description: Durthu's anger is so great, the Forest Spirits roused by him are instantly filled with violent desires.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Frenzy" for Dryad, Tree Kin and Treeman units
	(Lord's army)

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

colour_text: Taken from the corpse of a very important looking Skink Shaman, this ring is made from pure gold and is shaped like a snake with feathery bird wings. The ring allows the wearer to survive wounds that would normally kill a man

related_attributes.bullet_text: Even when performing the most fatiguing actions, this unit never loses vigour.

colour_text: Scores of viscious wolves have always been a part of Goblin armies and Grom, ever the clever tactician, uses a wooden whistle to signal his hidden Wolf Riders to surprise attack the enemy. The whistle is carved into the shape of a snarling wolf head and emits a howl whenever it is used.

ui_effects.localised_text: Summons a unit of Wolf Riders

related_attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute double their charge bonus when attacking the rear or flank of an entity.

item_set.name: Bane of Elves
item_set.description: Countless battles and endless skirmishes againts Elves have made Grom an expert at killing the pointy-ears.

effects.description:
Missile resistance: 10% when fighting against Elves
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Though he appears to be little more than sixteen summers of age, Sigvald has blighted the world for over three hundred years. This necklace might be the secret to his youthful appearance, for it absorbs part of the souls of the slain.

item_set.name: Hellish Hedonist
item_set.description: No matter how deranged or depraved, the temptation to join in such sickening, but pleasurable, behavior is greater when artefacts of Slaanesh are nearby.

colour_text: When Yuan Bo goes to war, he always wears a large finely cut jade crystal. The jade provides blessed protection and allows the heavenly energy to be distributed through spells.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Jade Shield"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Jade Shield Upgraded"

item_set.name: Tax the Loot
item_set.description: Wars are won by whoever has the most gold. Our loyal soldiers will happily contribute to our war funds.

colour_text: The name given to this khopesh means, "Death," and the dark blade is forever stained crimson due to ending so many lives.

item_set.name: Divine Favour
item_set.description: The Ushabti in this army are truly chosen by the gods, for they have been granted blessed weapons and protection.

effects.description:
Enables magical attacks for Ushabti and Ushabti (Great Bows) units
	(Lord's army)

Physical resistance: +15% for Ushabti and Ushabti (Great Bows) units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: In life, Cylostra was a vain and self-obsessed woman. She was always concerned with her appearance and kept a mirrored staff close at hand. In undeath, the staff now serves as a powerful channeling rod after being given arcane properties by Stromfels.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

item_set.name: Mistress of the Deep
item_set.description: Power is one of the few known secrets found in the deepest depths of the sea.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -20% for Lore of the Deep

colour_text: Some Fimir worship a cyclopean diety, known as Balor. This crude rectangular mace has engravings of a diamond inside a larger diamond carved on the four sides of the weapon. These diamond symbols represent Balor's power to kill what it sees.

item_set.name: We Need Slaves
item_set.description: When the Fimir raiding parties go to war, capturing slaves is the priority. Pillaging and killing are just bonuses.

effects.description: Unit ability: "Slaver Nets" for Ketzak Fimdirach and Fimir Warriors units

colour_text: A leather bracelet made from the tanned hides of savage Northern beasts. Enchanted iron spikes surround the bracelet, giving the wearer the strength of the monsters found in Norsca.

item_set.name: Strength of Bears
item_set.description: Under Beorg's leadership, the Bearmen of Urslo have been blessed with the might of bears.

effects.description:
Enables rattled attacks for Marauder Bearmen units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: A regular Choppa is too ungainly for a typical human to wield, but Oglok easily carries this massive weapon into battle. Even a Black Orc will hesitate to challenge anyone using this deadly chunk of metal.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.

item_set.name: Need fo Speed
item_set.description: This Warboss seems to be obsessed with going faster; always trying to aquire items that enhance speed.

colour_text: A magic sword taken from an Emir of Araby after being defeated in single combat.  It has never dulled and provides supernatural speed to whoever holds the weapon.

item_set.name: Campaigner
item_set.description: In life, the Red Duke led a successful invasion of Araby. He can now apply his skill to his Undead horde.

effects.description: Replenishes 10% campaign movement range after winning a battle

colour_text: King Setep's legendary weapon is known for its infamous blue blade. The curved sword shatters armour with every attack. While Mortuary Cult has made many replicas of this weapon, they can not match the original's power.

item_set.name: Priest King
item_set.description: King Setep's many dealings with the Mortuary Cult has provided him with a collection of powerful artefacts. He understands the importance of the Cult and always wants a Liche Priest near.

colour_text: Every season, great heroes, brave knights and lauded adventurers ride north, seeking Throgg’s lair to slay him. Becoming quite annoyed with the constant attempts on his life, Throgg crafted his great maul to help crush these heroes.

item_set.name: Will Not Die
item_set.description: Trolls are infamous for their regenerative abilities making them almost impossible to kill. What happens when a Troll has a collection of magic items?

colour_text: The blade of this weapon appears to be made from magma and is wreathed in magical fire that burns as it slices through foes.

item_set.name: Natural Architect
item_set.description: In another life, King Thutep would've been a fantastic Necrotect. Luckily, being Undead has given him another life.

effects.description:
Construction time: -25% for all buildings
	(all provinces)

colour_text: Jorek designed an ingenious breechloading, spring-powered, repeating rifle.  Sadly, the weapon was deemed too radical by the Dwarfen Engineers' Guild, and the firearm was never approved for mass production.

Although this ancient jian looks like a regular weapon, it was the only successful creation of a lost form of smithing.  It is incredibly dense and extremely heavy for its size. In fact, it is so heavy only something as strong as a Dragon can lift it.

item_set.name: Grand Alchemist
item_set.description: Years spent experimenting in the House of Secrets while providing tutelage to fellow Alchemists has led to the creation of a more potent gun powder.

effects.description:
Missile damage: +10% for Crane Gunners, Fire Rain Rockets, Grand Cannons, Iron Hail Gunners, Sky-Junk, and Sky Lantern units
	(all armies factionwide)

Hero recruit rank: +3 for Alchemists
	(all provinces)

colour_text: As an Exalted Champion, Khargan has been awarded this magic axe by his dark masters. The weapon is much too large for a regular man to use and has jagged spines extending from the axe head. It has never dulled and has proven indestructable.

item_set.name: Crazy Killers
item_set.description: Warriors witness Khargan's merciless killing-sprees and notice the many artefacts gifted to him. Perhaps if they behave more like Khargan...

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 for Aspiring Champions, Dragon Ogre Shaggoth, Chosen of Nurgle and Chaos Warriors units
	(Hero's army)

Weapon strength: +10% for Aspiring Champions, Dragon Ogre Shaggoth, Chosen of Nurgle and Chaos Warriors units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: The Spiderclaw Tribe was hired by a servant of Tzeentch to capture Karl Franz. The Chaos servant gifted Raknik this blade and promised more treasure if the tribe was successful. The Goblins failed and the tribe was destroyed at the Battle of Bloodpine Woods.

item_set.name: Forest Lurker
item_set.description: The dark forests of the Old World are natural habitats for the Forest Goblins and their spiders. They excel at fighting in such an environment.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

Reload time reduction: +10% during forest battles
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Mournhowl has hunted down and ripped to shreads many people, animals and monsters. His fangs have sharpened and hardened, and he has developed a tactic to best utilise his deadly muzzle in war.

item_set.name: Hunter Killer
item_set.description: No target is safe from Mournhowl. He is now equipped to relentlessly hunt far and wide; until he has slain his prey.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

effects.description: This character becomes able to see enemies hiding in forest regardless of distance

colour_text: The Everqueen does not fight in a conventional manner and eschews weapons of all kind. She represents the mortal embodiment of Isha, and her touch is anathema to those with even a taint of corruption in their hearts.

effects.description:
Chance of a plague spreading: -30%
	(Lord's army)

Seduce Units budget: -30%
	(enemy Slaaneshi armies in local region)
Weapon strength: +50% when fighting against Greenskins, Skaven, Dark Elves, Beastmen, Warriors of Chaos, Daemons of Chaos, Chaos Dwarfs and Norsca

item_set.name: Protector of the Natural Order
item_set.description: One of Isha's domains is nature, and the goddess protects her forest allies with her blessing.

effects.description:
Ward save: +10% for Forest Spirit units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: The pommel of this Tomb Blade was crafted to resemble the striking head of a king cobra with ruby eyes. It excels when used for quick slashing and parrying. Drops of deadly venom condensate on the blade's curved edge, allowing the weapon to kill by a mere scratch.

item_set.name: Known to the Old World
item_set.description: "When my father ruled, Nehekhara was known as the greatest empire to ever exist. Every civilization feared us. Now is the time to remind the Old World of our power!"

contains.name: Death Mask of King Alkhazzar II

effects.description: Diplomatic relations: +20 with men, High Elves, Wood Elves, Lizardmen and Dwarfs

colour_text: Despite their unworldly beauty, the monstrous and predatory desires of Slaaneshi Daemons cannot be fully hidden. The savage nature is usually revealed as jagged crustacean claws, with some Daemonologists believing there is a link between Slaanesh and oceanic creatures. Reguardless, the Masque is able to use these beastial appendages with deadly efficiency as part of her never ending dance.

item_set.name: Unholy Pageant
item_set.description: The artefacts of Slaanesh will always attract the Daemonettes.

effects.description:
Recruitment cost: -50% for Daemonettes of Slaanesh and Exalted Daemonettes of Slaanesh units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: An extraordinary and sturdy firearm created by the most skilled Daemonsmiths. Nightmarish infusions are bound to the weapon by using twisted Runes that are engraved along the gun's barrel.

After becoming a Vampire, Countess Isabella was given this fine rapier.  The weapon's narrow pointed blade and guard are made from the rare metal, known as Silversteel, while several emeralds decorate the pommel.  A fortune was spent to create such a lavish sword.

item_set.name: Vampire Noble
item_set.description: As a daughter of an Elector Count, Isabella learned to make sure taxes were always collected.

colour_text: After becoming a Vampire, Countess Isabella was given this fine rapier.  The weapon's narrow pointed blade and guard are made from the rare metal, known as Silversteel, while several emeralds decorate the pommel.  A fortune was spent to create such a lavish sword.

item_set.name: Vampire Noble
item_set.description: As a daughter of an Elector Count, Isabella learned to make sure taxes were always collected.

colour_text: As an influential Infernal Castellan, Ezar has commissioned skilled Daemonsmiths to enhanced his mighty fireglaive with custom modifications, making his firearm much more powerful than the standard weaponry.

item_set.name: Modified Firearms
item_set.description: After aquiring a bountiful collection of artefacts and treasures, Ezar can afford to equip better firearms for his soldiers. He only does this to gain more personal glory, of course.

colour_text: This sword and pistol belonged to the famed and obsessive duelist, Gabriel Feraud, who claimed to have killed over 100 men via duels. After dying (of old age of course), the weapons were purchased by a wealthy ship captain, who perished along the Vampire Coast.

item_set.name: Reptile Reaper
item_set.description: One does not rule the Vampire Coast without extensive experience battling Lizardmen.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +10% when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

Melee attack: +5 when fighting against Lizardmen
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: To assist his followers with their many wars, Khsar, the god of the desert, enchanted this sickle-shaped sword. The magic weapon burns its enemies with searing heat, similiar to that of the desert sand.

item_set.name: Nomadic Tactics
item_set.description: To defeat the nomad, you must fight like the nomad.

colour_text: A large dagger with a golden hilt and a long wavelike blade. The weapon is used to sever the invisible cords of fate that connect a soul to possible futures. Once fate is cut off, a distortion of spacetime is created and the victim simply ceases to exist.

related_attributes.bullet_text: A unit with Executioner will execute units in combat below a 20% hit points threshold.

colour_text: Many ancient secrets have been forgotten and lost to time, but some of those secrets are remembered by the oldest beings.  Coeddil marks his body with bygone symbols and wards to greatly enhance his already formidable strength.

item_set.name: Natural Wards
item_set.description: Coeddil is able to use his collection of items to draw protective energy from the very trees of the forest.

effects.description:
Ward save: 5% during forest battles
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: Scyla's gnarled claws are now permanently bloodstained and have hardened, developing a razor-like quality that easily slices and tears through flesh.

item_set.name: Epitome of Violence
item_set.description: Scyla has become a living weapon. Killing is the only thing he can do.

colour_text: Secret  knowledge of alchemy and metal was used create this powerful sword. Although it is made of gold, the alchemy used during the weapon's creation has made the metal stronger than any mundane steel and also attracts the Winds of Magic.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +5 per turn
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

colour_text: Decorated with various trinkets and the skulls of beasts and men, this gnarled staff was created from a fallen sage tree. It is specifically designed and attuned for communion with the Spirits of Kislev.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -15% for all spells

item_set.name: Natural Remedies
item_set.description: Although Mother Ostankya is extremely dangerous, she also has vast knowledge of healing roots, herbs and fungi to aid those she views as allies.

colour_text: All Dryads are shape shifters and capable of altering their forms, but Drycha is ancient and more skilled at changing her appearance.  She is capable of growing long and deadly thorns that are sharper than any sword.

item_set.name: Feral Friends
item_set.description: The vicious creatures of the forest are eager to fight in Drycha's war against nature.

effects.description:
Upkeep and cost: -60% for Cave Bats, Feral Manticore, Giant Spiders, Great Hawks, Giant Wolves and Feral Bear units
	(all armies)

colour_text: Tretch skulks around the battlefield armed with an affectionately named spear, called Jabber, and a rake, named Flayer. The weapons are imbued with dark power and glow with a pulsing green light, making them especially deadly. Many slaves were traded for such powerful armaments.

item_set.name: Finders Keepers
item_set.description: It is amazing what treasures can be found on the dead, and Tretch makes sure he takes the time to safely look for it.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +25%

colour_text: A large cudgel crafted to resemble the gaping mawl of a Carnosaur.  A glowing sphere of hardened jade adorns this weapon, providing it with arcane power.

A legendary battle axe made with skill that almost resembles the ancient and forgotten techniques used to create the most powerful weapons. It took a lifetime and countless rare resources to perfect this artefact, but the effort was well worth it. The name roughly translates to, "Mountain Slayer."

A heavy axe based upon the native Chracian design of the woodsman's axe. It was used to slay the legendary lion, known as Uabaiff, and now has one of the's fangs of the dreaded beast imbued into the axe's blade.

item_set.name: Legend of Chrace
item_set.description: Armed with his powerful equipment, Alastar is ready to lead the soldiers of Chrace to victory.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 for White Lions of Chrace, War Lions and Lion Chariot units
	(Lord's army)

Melee defence: +5 for White Lions of Chrace, War Lions and Lion Chariot units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: Nakai famously appeared at the defence of Itza during the Great Catastrophe, slaying countless daemons at the Bridge of the Stars. He was awarded a powerful artefact left behind by Chotec, the Lord of the Sun.

item_set.name: Divine Kroxigor
item_set.description: Empowered with a variety of ancient treasures, Nakai's mere pressence increases the spawning of his fellow Kroxigors.

effects.description:
Upkeep: -15% for Kroxigor and Sacred Kroxigor units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Crude, but an effective axe at slaying Men. Grukmur found the weapon on a dead Bestigor after a bloody battle. The origins of the axe are unknown, but as they say, "finders keepers."

item_set.name: Maneater
item_set.description: The only good thing about Men is you get to eat them after you kill them.

effects.description:
Weapon strength: +20% when fighting against Humans
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: To cast down the human gods and destroy all civilization is the ultimate goal of the vicious Beastmen. This crude axe was a gift from a powerful Chaos Daemon and is to be used to bring the end to mankind.

item_set.name: Master of Dhar
item_set.description: Dhar, also known as Black Magic, draws on all eight of the Winds. With such an array of artefacts, the dark sorceries are more powerful than thought possible.

colour_text: With a blade as pale as the light of Mannslieb and transparent as the morning's mist, this sword ignores even the sturdiest armour and slices through flesh with ghastly ease.

The city of Mordheim was destroyed by a Warpstone meteor in 1999 IC. This sword was found in the city's ruins and is stained black by the Dark Magic that filled the area. The blade is also poisonous to the touch, making it a perfect weapon for a Necromancer.

item_set.name: Endless Corpses
item_set.description: An effective Undead army will have a numberless amount of bodies to feed ghouls, perform evil experiments and replenish combatants.

colour_text: Dechala wears a gilded metal barb that neatly fits over the scorpion stinger found at the tip of her serpentine tail. The weapon has three razor-sharp blades with deep grooves extending through them, allowing the paralyzing venom of her stinger to incapacitate victims who survive the lashings of her tail.

item_set.name: Exuding Decadence
item_set.description: With enough of Slaanesh's treasures collected, thralls gather and hedonistic desires make manifest.

colour_text: A collection of moulted flight feathers that were plucked from a Lord of Change during a prank. The quills are razor sharp and effuse sparks of chromatic colours when used for writing... or stabbing...

item_set.name: Masses of Magic
item_set.description: The near infinite amount of spells collected by the Blue Scribes attracts Pink and Blue Horrors and strengthens the Daemons' corporeal forms.

colour_text: A powerful halberd found in the vast wreckage of the Galleon's Graveyard. Clearly the weapon was made by Dwarfs, for the craftmanship is beyond the skill of any man and the curved blade has Dwarfen Runes etched into it.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +20%

item_set.name: Sea Monsters
item_set.description: Monstrous creatures from the depths of the ocean are drawn to items attuned by the sea.

colour_text: A heavy Gromril smithing hammer. Normally, the tool would be used for crafting Runes, but it can also serve as a powerful weapon.

effects.description: Shared cooldown: -10% for all Rune Magic
Shared cooldown: -10% for all Master Rune Magic

item_set.name: Syphoner of the Winds
item_set.description: The proper collection of gear will allow a Runesmith to extract a massive amount of magic from the surrounding area, leaving less power available for enemy wizards.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic cost: +15% for all enemy spells
	(enemy armies in local region)

colour_text: This cutlass was made from the rare metal known as ithilmar, and has a large ruby embedded into the weapon's hilt. It was created long ago in Vaul's Anvil and draws power from the ocean, allowing the magical sword to strike with the strength of a tidal wave.

effects.description: Melee attack: +10 when fighting at sea
Weapon strength: 30% when fighting at sea

item_set.name: Mathlann's Favoured
item_set.description: Despite being a fickle and unpredictable god, sometimes Mathlann does spare his most devout worshipers.

effects.description:
Enables magical attacks for Ship's Company units
	(all armies)

Ward save: 10% for Ship's Company units
	(all armies)

colour_text: Found from a rich deposit of silver ore located in the Realms of Chaos, this jagged silver shard is able to easily slice through armour and serves as a conduit for spells involving silver.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Searing Doom"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Searing Doom Upgraded"

item_set.name: Loremaster, Lore of Metal
item_set.description: "Who do you think shared the secrets of Chamon with Balthasar Gelt?"

effects.description: Cooldown: -25% to Lore of Metal spells

target_if: Grounded
Not on or below a platform

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for Lore of Metal spells

colour_text: After his hands were hacked off and eaten by Bron Rockgrinder, Skrag rammed his Butcher's implements into his wrist-stumps to form makeshift weapons. These serrated cleavers have sliced and hewn so much flesh that the weapons have been empowered by the Great Maw.

item_set.name: Chef der Quzeen
item_set.description: Skrag now has all the tools he needed to become a master chef, encouraging Ogres to stick around for fancy eats.

colour_text: On occasions of particular peril, the Fay Enchantress will ride alongside her armies while wielding her mighty sword. The weapon glimmers and leaves a brief trace of arcing light when swung, and it is especially effective against the forces of destruction.

effects.description: Weapon strength: +25% when fighting against Beastmen, Chaos Dwarfs, Daemons, Dark Elves, Greenskins, Skaven, Warriors of Chaos, Norsca, and Undead

item_set.name: Blessings of the Grail
item_set.description: The greatest servants of the Lady are given blessed weapons to vanquish all foes.

effects.description:
Armour-piercing weapon damage: +5 for Grail Knights, Grail Guardians, Royal Pegasus Knights, and Hippogryph Knights units
	(Lord's army)

colour_text: These six swords were each individually blessed with a unique ability by the Dark Prince himself. The weapons gain power through absorbing emotions, and nothing is more emotional than the stress and adrenaline of war.

ui_effects.localised_text: Effect intensity increases with time spent engaged in melee.

item_set.name: Exuding Decadence
item_set.description: With enough of Slaanesh's treasures collected, thralls gather and hedonistic desires make manifest.

colour_text: A gigantic scimitar and spiked club fondly called, "Slisa and Smasha," by Golgfag. Although lacking mystical qualities, these weapons are deadlier in the hands of an Ogre than most man-sized magic artefacts.

effects.description: Enables "Dazed" contact effect (reduced Speed and Melee Defence)

item_set.name: Literal Maneaters
item_set.description: Envious of Golgfag's collection of treasures and with hopes to join the legendary mercenary, Ogres near and far make an extra effort to eat more humanoids.

contains.name: War Crown of the Forgotten Conqueror

effects.description:
Bonus vs Infantry: +5 for Ogre Infantry units
	(all armies factionwide)

colour_text: Dripping with puss and giving off an offensive odor, this huge staff was made from a gnarled tree grown in Nurgle's Garden. The crook is so foul, a sickly green miasma can be seen eminating from it. Nurgle's servants become strengthened by this artefact's presence.

item_set.name: Old Sawbones
item_set.description: Festus' insane knowledge of anatomy allow him to operate and enhance his warriors of Nurgle.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +7 for Nurgle units
	(all units in army)

colour_text: Cut from a tree felled by Sigmar himself.  The stake was held in the Temple of Sigmar at Obersdorf, until the temple was pillaged by Greenskins. The relic was thought lost until it appeared in the hands of Dr. Hertwig van Hal.

effects.description: Weapon strength: +35% when fighting against Vampire Counts, Vampire Coast and Tomb Kings

colour_text: A gilded khopesh used by King Rakhash during his conquests of Mahrak, Lybaras and Lahmia. The military campaigns were so decisive, Djaf, the Nehekharan god of war and death, blessed this weapon.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +5 when attacking
	(all units in army)

item_set.name: Gold Fever
item_set.description: "There's gold behind those walls. I will have it."

contains.name: Ring of the Mighty River Horse

colour_text: The metal blade of this ancient sword has lost its sharp edge, but has been cursed to bring death from a mere touch. Only the Undead can wield such a weapon, for they are immune to the sword's deadly curse.

effects.description: Wound action: Additional 10% chance of wounding target

item_set.name: Return of the King
item_set.description: The Barrow King goes to war once more. Armed with his full panoply, he brings a renewed fighting spirit to his loyal soldiers.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +10 for Grave Guard and Black Knights units
	(Hero's army)

colour_text: When drawn from its scabbard, the blade from this jian erupts into a white flame that destroys evil.  A great gift from the Dragon Emperor that has proven vital in holding the Great Bastion on several occassions.

effects.description: Weapon strength: +15% when fighting against Beastmen, Chaos Dwarfs, Daemons, Dark Elves, Greenskins, Skaven, Warriors of Chaos, Norsca, and Undead

item_set.name: Castellan to the Great Bastion
item_set.description: Centuries of defending the Dragon's Spine has taught Miao Ying to always be prepared for a siege.

colour_text: Forged under the midsummer sun by an eccentric Dwarf. During its creation, the weapon was doused in Manticore's blood and excels at beast slaying.
This ancient bastard sword was blessed by holy rites and is quite the formidable weapon against the forces of evil.

effects.description: Weapon strength: +10% when fighting against Beastmen, Chaos Dwarfs, Daemons, Dark Elves, Greenskins, Skaven, Warriors of Chaos, Norsca, and Undead

colour_text: A being capable of taking any form requires a weapon with similiar properties. This silver cylindrical rod can be used as a powerful weapon and can take the form of of almost any piece of equipment desired by the owner.

item_set.name: Never Enough Pawns
item_set.description: The most elaborate tricks sometimes requires assistance from, "allies."

colour_text: A burning hot ooze salivates from Karanak's mouths in anticipation to the kill. The drool quickly disolves flesh and burns those who are bitten.

item_set.name: Fetch!
item_set.description: It seems even the most vicious and violent Hound enjoys bringing items to its master.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +50%

colour_text: The left hand has been replaced by a large rotary device with spinning steel blades. The blades are lined with Warpstone, allowing the weapon to slice through the thickest armour and toughest hides with ease.

item_set.name: More Machine Than Mutant
item_set.description: One look at Ghoritch will make you wonder if there is anything left alive on his giant body.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute ignore the effects of enemy contact effects such as  Poison

colour_text: A flamberge bearing the Mark of Chaos. A spiked flail with obvious signs of corruption. These weapons came from the Warp, and the muscular Thomin is easily able to wield each weapon with one hand.

item_set.name: Sorcerer Lord of Change
item_set.description: The most powerful sorcerers of Tzeentch are able to make slight adjustments to reality. An army is seen in the distance, and suddenly it is right in front of you!

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

colour_text: Khatep is the religious head of the Mortuary Cult and the first member of the order to truly deny death.  He carries with him a golden sword, designed as a large feathered wing and is symbolic of his authority.

item_set.name: Oldest and Wisest
item_set.description: Khatep was the first member of the Mortuary Cult to truly deny death's embrace. He uses his ancient knowledge to remember the secrets of past dynasties.
